title: DOI Phase 8 — Advanced Pillars Assessment
description: Structured form of departments/{dept-slug}/assessments/advanced.md. Two advanced pillars (Knowledge Management, AI Automation), each scored 3-15 with 3 sub-dimensions scored 1-5. Only produced when the advanced gate (foundational_level == 3 AND every foundational pillar >= 8/15) passes.

gate_check_passed.description: Must be true for this file to exist. Recorded explicitly so downstream tooling can verify the gate was honored.

total_advanced.description: Sum of the two advanced pillar totals.

tool_validation_notes.description: Free-form prose on claimed-vs-observed AI/automation capabilities.

evidence_cite.description: File path with optional section/line — e.g. 'verified-role.md §2', 'gap-analysis.md row 4', '_uploads/MANIFEST.md row 7'.

rating_15.description: Sub-dimension score 0-5 with justification and evidence citation.

score.description: Pillar total. Must equal sum of sub_dimensions[*].score.

sub_dimensions.description: Three sub-dimensions per advanced pillar. Each is a rating_15.
